allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess; "---check 8010 8080 9000---"; foreach\($p in 8010,8080,9000\){ try{ $l=[System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener]::new\([System.Net.IPAddress]::Loopback,$p\); $l.Start\(\); $l.Stop\(\); "$p FREE" } catch { "$p BUSY" } })
